titleStmt.title: SII 9.187: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 187. (A.R. No. 319 of 1925.) ON A STONE PLANTED BEFORE THE RUINED KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT KOTTUR, KUDLIGI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 36, Nandana, Vaiśākha, śu. 3, Bṛihaspativāra, Uttarāyaṇa (time ?) corresponding probably to A.D. 1112 April 1 Monday, not Thursday, as stated. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and mentions the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Tribhuvanamalla-Pāṇḍyadēva as ruling over Noṇambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand and Ghaṭṭiyarasa of the Kadamba dynasty, as ruling over Kōgaḷi five-hundred. The latter is said to have made a gift of land, after washing the feet of Amṛitarāśi-Paṇḍitadēva, for the service of the god Rāmēśvara of Koṭṭūru and for feeding ascetics.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
viśuddhajñānadēhāya trivēdīdibyacakṣuṣē . śrēyaḥprāptinimittāya namaḥ sōmārdhdhadhāriṇē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamā
caṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara kāṁcīpurava
rādhīśvaraṁ yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamārtaṇḍa paricchēdigaṁḍaṁ rājiga
cōḷamanōbhaṁgaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhriṁgaṁ śrimanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara tribhuvanamallapā
ṇḍyadēvaru noṇaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsiramumaṁ sukhasankathāvinōdadiṁdāḷdu rājyaṁgeyyu
ttamire samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara banavāsipuravarādhīśvaraṁ bhūmyēṁ
duśēkharaprasādōtpattitriḷōcanamayūravarmmakaṁdabānvayavibhūṣaṇa permmaṭṭitūryyanirgghō
ṣaṇaṁ himavadgirīṁdraruṁdraśikharīśikharasphaṭikaśiḷāstaṁbha baddhamadagajamahāmahimābhirāmaṁ
saṁgrāmabhīmaṁ Aṣṭādaśāśvamēdhādīkṣitaṁ caturāśītinagarādhiṣṭitaṁ Uccaṁgīdēvīlabdhavaraprasādaṁ
mrigamadāmōdaṁ dāyigamanneyamrigabēṁṭekāṟaṁ Allahulidēvanaṁkakāṟaṁ śrīcaṁdrē
śvaradēvara pādābjabhriṁgaṁ sāhasōttugaṁ śrimanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ ghaṭṭiyarasaṁ duṣṭanigraha
visiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ kōgaḷiyaiynūṟumanāḷdu sukhadiṁ rājyageyyuttaṁ svasti śrī cāḷukyavikra
mavarṣada 36 neya naṁdanasaṁvatsarada vaiśākha śuddha 3 brihaspativāramumuttarāyaṇasaṁ
krā(ṁ)ntiya parvvanimittamumāgi svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhā
nejapatapasamādhiśīlasampannaruṁ vyākaraṇādyāgamasiddhāṁtatarkkakarkkaśaruṁ dīnānāthāśri
tajanakalpavrikṣaruṁ gurukuḷasamuddharaṇarumappa śrīkoṭṭūra mūlasthānaṁ śrī
rāmēśvaradēvarasthānadācāryyarappa śrīmadamṛtarāśipaṁḍita dēvara kālaṁ karcci dhā
rāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi dēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ nivēdyakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ tapōdhanarāhā
radānakkaṁ pāvuḷavarggakkaṁ koṭṭūra teṁkaṇa polada nēṟilikeṟeyumanā keṟeya keḷagaṇa
gaddeyumaṁ maṟiyūra sīmeyiṁ baḍagalu nāganūra sīmeyiṁ mūḍalu banniyabāgiṁ taṁ
kalu kāṟukucana koḻana dāriyiṁ paḍuvalaṁtu nālkuṁ sīmeyiṁ naḍuve koṭṭa Erayakeyi mattaru
mūvattu kisukāḍu mattarirppattu Antumattaraivattuṁ piriyakeṟeya bayalugadde kamma
nālnūṟayvattu sāyira baḷḷiya tōṁṭamumondu gāṇamu kōṭeyoḷage nālku maneya
nelasaṇamumaṁ koṭṭarintī dharmmamaṁ sadharmmadiṁ rakṣisidavaru śrīgaṁgevāraṁāsikurukṣē
tradalli sāyira kapileyaṁ kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ponnalu kaṭṭi vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge ko
ṭṭa phalamaṁ paḍevarī dharmmamanaḷidavaru sāyira kavilegaḷumaṁ brāhmaṇarumaṁ konda pāpaṁ
paḍevaru svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvarṣasahasrāṇiviṣṭāyāṁ jāya
tē krimiḥ . Akarasya karōtpattirggōsahasravadhasmritaḥ karapravrittivicchēdō gōkōṭiphalamaśnutē .
śrīghaṭṭidēvana sandhivigrahi mallaparājaṁ baredaṁ kaṁḍarisidaṁ mādimōjaṁ śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.187 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
